title: melastomataceae
intro: The melastomataceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the melastome family. This family consists of approximately 170 genera and over 5,000 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Melastomataceae plants are typically characterized by their small to medium-sized flowers and often have distinctive fruiting structures. The family is widely distributed across the Americas, Africa, Asia, and Australia, with a few species found in the Pacific Islands.
